subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Bear thou witness that there is none other God but Him, and all before Him are worshippers prostrate. Therefore place thy trust in God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله اشهدی علی انه لا اله الا هو و کل له ساجدون فتوکلی علی الله
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @soul; spirit after death, @thankfulness; gratitude, @transcendence; unknowability of God
